top3.sql:
SELECT 
    COUNT(*) * 1.0 / (julianday('2015-12-31') - julianday('2012-01-01')) * 365.25 AS annual_avg_sets,
    (SELECT language FROM foreign_data WHERE language != 'en' GROUP BY language ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) AS common_language
FROM sets
WHERE releaseDate >= '2012-01-01' AND releaseDate <= '2015-12-31';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) / 4 AS annual_average_sets,
    (SELECT language FROM foreign_data WHERE language IS NOT NULL GROUP BY language ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) AS common_language
FROM sets
WHERE releaseDate BETWEEN '2012-01-01' AND '2015-12-31';

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) * 1.0 / (julianday('2015-12-31') - julianday('2012-01-01')) * 365.25 AS annual_avg_sets,
    (SELECT language FROM foreign_data WHERE language != 'en' GROUP BY language ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) AS common_language
FROM sets
WHERE releaseDate >= '2012-01-01' AND releaseDate <= '2015-12-31';
